name: White Chocolate Berry Pie
recipeIngredient: 15-ounce Pillsbury Refrigerated Pie Crusts, one package
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake 1 pie crust according to package directions for a one-crust baked shell. Cool completely.
2. Microwave the white chocolate and milk in four squares for about 2 minutes or until almost melted. Stir until melted. Allow to cool to room temperature.
3. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese with powdered sugar and orange peel on low speed using an electric mixer until smooth. Beat in the white chocolate mixture.
4. Fold the whipped cream into the white chocolate mixture. Spread evenly in the bottom of the cooled baked shell. Arrange raspberries over the filling. Drizzle with melted white chocolate.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until serving time. Store in the refrigerator.
Makes 8 servings.
Notes:
You can substitute 4 ounces of German sweet chocolate and 1/4 cup milk for the white chocolate and milk.
